zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Mablethorpe於1319年出生在英國林可爾史爾馬波索普時，他的父親Robert De Mablethorpe26歲，母親Jane De Mabelthorpe43歲。他於1344年與Lady Matilda在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國林可爾史爾林肯享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Mablethorpe于1319年出生在英国林可爾史爾馬波索普时，他的父亲Robert De Mablethorpe26岁，母亲Jane De Mabelthorpe43岁。他于1344年与Lady Matilda在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国林可爾史爾林肯享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Mablethorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Mablethorpe (Lincs), which is recorded as Malbertorp in 1086, Maubertorp in 1176.

variants.name: Mapletoft
meanings: English: (i) of uncertain origin; perhaps a locative name from an unidentified place, presumably in or near Lincs. (ii) alternatively, perhaps, a variant of Maplethorpe , modified as if containing Middle English toft ‘building plot’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Mablethorpe was born in 1319, in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert De Mablethorpe, was 26 and his mother, Jane De Mabelthorpe, was 43. He married Lady Matilda in 1344, in Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1370, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Mablethorpe est né en 1319, à Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Mablethorpe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane De Mabelthorpe, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilda en 1344, à Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1370, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Mablethorpe 1319 in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Mablethorpe 26 und seine Mutter Jane De Mabelthorpe 43. Er hat 1344 in Norton, Northamptonshire, England Lady Matilda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Mablethorpe è nato il nel 1319 nel Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Robert De Mablethorpe, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Jane De Mabelthorpe, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Lady Matilda nel 1344, nel Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Mablethorpeが1319年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマブレソルペで生まれた時，父Robert De Mablethorpeは26歳，母Jane De Mabelthorpeは43歳であった。1344年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートンでLady Matildaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Mablethorpe(이)가 1319년 영국 링코실르 마블레소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Mablethorpe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane De Mabelthorpe(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르턴에서 Lady Matilda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Mablethorpe nasceu em 1319, em Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Mablethorpe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane De Mabelthorpe, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilda em 1344, em Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Mablethorpe родился в 1319 г. в местности маблетаурп, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert De Mablethorpe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane De Mabelthorpe, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilda в 1344 г. в местности нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Mablethorpe nació en 1319, en Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert De Mablethorpe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane De Mabelthorpe, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lady Matilda en 1344, en Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
